underlying_goal: Investigate and resolve ENG-1020200 (forensic extracted_text showing obfuscated content with enable-obfuscate: false) and manage the multipass rule engine work
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly insisted the obfuscation was a bug until the user clarified the actual config semantics, and the reproducer script needed multiple fixes to locate forensics correctly.
brief_summary: User wanted to determine whether obfuscated forensic content under enable-obfuscate: false was a bug; Claude traced the code path, the user clarified it was expected behavior, then the fix was committed and pushed.
